net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface PhysicalObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Curtain, Galley, Lavatory, Seat, Stairway, Stowage
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    CurtainImpl, GalleyImpl, LavatoryImpl, PhysicalObjectImpl, SeatImpl, StairwayImpl, StowageImpl

    public interface PhysicalObject
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Physical Object'.

    The following features are supported:

    • YPosition
    • XPosition
    • YDimension
    • XDimension
    • Name
    • Id
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getPhysicalObject()

    • Method Detail

      • getYPosition

        int getYPosition()
        Returns the value of the 'YPosition' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'YPosition' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'YPosition' attribute.
        See Also:
        setYPosition(int), CabinPackage.getPhysicalObject_YPosition()

      • setYPosition

        void setYPosition(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'YPosition' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'YPosition' attribute.
        See Also:
        getYPosition()

        Returns the value of the 'XPosition' attribute.

        See Also:

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns the value of the 'Id' attribute. The default value is "0".

        If the meaning of the 'Id' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Id' attribute.
        See Also:
        setId(int), CabinPackage.getPhysicalObject_Id()

        void setId(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Id' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Id' attribute.
        See Also:
